description: Hand-labeled obligation oracle for selected DORA articles (EN). Anchor quotes are verbatim from the official text and the bundled Formex fixture. 3 of 11 obligations are deliberate known gaps (no covering control in the synthetic bank) to grade gap detection.

obligations.anchor_quote: Financial entities shall have in place an internal governance and control framework that ensures an effective and prudent management of ICT risk
obligations.action: have in place an internal governance and control framework ensuring effective and prudent management of ICT risk

obligations.anchor_quote: The management body of the financial entity shall define, approve, oversee and be responsible for the implementation of all arrangements related to the ICT risk management framework
obligations.actor: The management body of the financial entity
obligations.action: define, approve, oversee and be responsible for the implementation of all ICT risk management framework arrangements

obligations.anchor_quote: Financial entities shall have a sound, comprehensive and well-documented ICT risk management framework
obligations.action: have a sound, comprehensive and well-documented ICT risk management framework

obligations.anchor_quote: shall include at least strategies, policies, procedures, ICT protocols and tools that are necessary to duly and adequately protect all information assets and ICT assets
obligations.action: ensure the ICT risk management framework includes strategies, policies, procedures, ICT protocols and tools to protect information and ICT assets

obligations.anchor_quote: Financial entities shall define, establish and implement an ICT-related incident management process to detect, manage and notify ICT-related incidents
obligations.action: define, establish and implement an ICT-related incident management process to detect, manage and notify incidents

obligations.anchor_quote: Financial entities shall record all ICT-related incidents and significant cyber threats
obligations.action: record all ICT-related incidents and significant cyber threats and ensure consistent monitoring, handling and follow-up

obligations.anchor_quote: Financial entities shall report major ICT-related incidents to the relevant competent authority
obligations.action: report major ICT-related incidents to the relevant competent authority

obligations.anchor_quote: Financial entities shall submit to the relevant competent authority the following
obligations.action: submit an initial notification, an intermediate report and a final report on major ICT-related incidents

obligations.anchor_quote: establish, maintain and review a sound and comprehensive digital operational resilience testing programme as an integral part of the ICT risk management framework
obligations.action: establish, maintain and review a sound and comprehensive digital operational resilience testing programme

obligations.anchor_quote: Financial entities shall manage ICT third-party risk as an integral component of ICT risk within their ICT risk management framework
obligations.action: manage ICT third-party risk as an integral component of ICT risk

obligations.anchor_quote: maintain and update at entity level, and at sub-consolidated and consolidated levels, a register of information in relation to all contractual arrangements on the use of ICT services
obligations.action: maintain and update a register of information on all contractual arrangements for ICT services provided by third parties
